preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth's the only one who sees it, though, at this moment?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys haven't yet. At the moment, you're talking to this dwarf or you're shoving him off the platform.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Can I see it as I'm cruising through? I see him?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We wanted to throw him as far as we could.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, the twins pull him up and one--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) All right. As you chuck the duergar through the air, the creature who briefly had stopped, and you guys now see its motion stop, and you get a full view of its horrible form. (grunting, panting sounds)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: As soon as I do that, I cast True Strike. (ftsssh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you cast True Strike on yourself?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: What it does is, it allows me to see--keep going, I'll tell you. Go ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so it stops for a second. You guys all get a view of its vision. As it's looking up towards where Keyleth is, suddenly its head (shh) snaps back into focus as the duergar goes swinging through the air. As it does (snarling) it licks its lips and you can see now, where its mouth is, the lips curl back and the jaw splits open slightly with this horrible Predator-like fanged jaw, and the two tentacles that are currently up in the air reach out, grab, and (tshhh) just split it in two. Its torso then divides and sprays it with crimson as it (tongue flicking noise) licks it out of the air. (breathy growling)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm still going! We're still going. I'm not standing and watching.
